Event: Royal Challenge - Season 30
Event Date: 01/10/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: AM7
Sign of Life Amulet

For the duration of the battle, when the amulet owner restores health to themself or any ally, they also increase that ally’s physical and magic armor by 20% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 5 times.
Once in a while, the unit restores 250000 health to an ally with the lowest health.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
